blended.narrative: Sun Peaks is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,685 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.1" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
